General.Name: Enterprise Development Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Enterprise Development Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the provision of integrated business software and hardware solutions in the People's Republic of China, Thailand, and Hong Kong. The company offers software maintenance services and other services. It is also involved in the sale of software licenses, hardware products, and other products; security trading and investment; and trading of fresh cassava. Enterprise Development Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Jubilee Centre, Wan Chai, Hong Kong

3.Name: Ms. Yuen Ying  Chan A.C.I.S., A.C.S., FCIS, FCS, MHKIoD
